negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_235
prompt: The video opens with a young man standing on an outdoor basketball court, preparing to shoot a basket. The court is surrounded by a grassy area with trees in the background, indicating a park-like setting. The man is dressed in a light-colored t-shirt, black shorts with white stripes, white socks, and bright green sneakers. He has a tattoo visible on his left arm. In front of him is a standard basketball hoop mounted on a tall, white pole, with a clear backboard above it. The sky is overcast, casting a soft, diffused light across the scene.  As the sequence progresses, the man runs towards the hoop, holding a basketball in his right hand. He leaps into the air, extending his right arm upwards to shoot the ball through the hoop. His right leg is bent at the knee, and his left arm is slightly extended for balance. The ball is released just as he reaches the peak of his jump, heading towards the net. The scene captures the dynamic motion of his leap and the trajectory of the ball mid-air. In the final frame, the man is seen grazing the circular rim with his right hand as his body comes down from being in the air. The ball goes through the net, indicating that he has successfully made the shot. The scene remains outdoors, with the grassy area and trees still visible in the background, maintaining the serene and focused atmosphere of the park.
